title: Login page not loading
description: Users are unable to access the login page after the latest deployment.

title: Payment gateway timeout
description: Transactions are failing due to timeout errors from the payment provider.

title: Profile image upload issue
description: Users cannot upload profile images larger than 2MB.

title: Dashboard statistics incorrect
description: Sales figures displayed on dashboard are not matching backend data.

title: Email notifications not sent
description: System is not sending order confirmation emails to customers.

title: Slow page loading
description: Product listing page takes more than 10 seconds to load.

title: Incorrect invoice generation
description: Invoices are showing incorrect tax calculations.

title: Search functionality broken
description: Search results are not appearing for valid product names.

title: Mobile layout misaligned
description: UI elements overlap on smaller screen devices.

title: Password reset link expired
description: Reset password links are expiring immediately after generation.

title: Database connection error
description: Application intermittently fails to connect to the database server.

title: Report export not working
description: Exporting reports to PDF results in corrupted files.

title: User role permission issue
description: Admin users cannot access restricted management pages.

title: Session timeout too short
description: Users are logged out after 5 minutes of inactivity.

title: API returning 500 error
description: Order API endpoint returns 500 error for bulk requests.
